tasks.command: bash -c 'if [ -d "frontend" ]; then cd frontend; fi; if [ ! -d "node_modules" ]; then npm install; fi && npm run dev'
tasks.label: Start Frontend (Dev)
Start Backend
tasks.command: bash -c 'if [ ! -d "backend/venv" ]; then python -m venv backend/venv && source backend/venv/Scripts/activate && pip install -r backend/requirements.txt; fi && source backend/venv/Scripts/activate && pip install -r backend/requirements.txt && fastapi dev backend/app'

tasks.label: Build Frontend
tasks.command: bash -c 'if [ -d "frontend" ]; then cd frontend; fi; if [ ! -d "node_modules" ]; then npm install; fi && npm run build'
